source_record_details.conditions: Inoculation in/on previously heated (cooked, baked, pasteurized, etc) but not sterilised food/medium, Modified atmosphere environment
source_record_details.citation: Dalgaard (et al.), 2000: Cooked and brined shrimps packed in a modified atmosphere have a shelf life of >7 months at 0 deg C, but spoil in 4-6 days at 25°C. Int. J. Food Science and Technology, 35, 431-442

construction_notes: elicited_inputs derived from ComBase record_id 4531 (Seafood/fish / Warmwater shrimps in brine). N0 = log_cfu at lowest step. Curve spans the full 100-step / 1500h grid with every step either a real observation or linear interpolation between two real readings -- no gp_posterior fill, no padding past the experiment's end. past/future_temperature_segments are an approximate human-readable split of the curve's duration (constant temperature); ground_truth_curve.values is the actual gridded trajectory. Not a generalization claim -- used to sanity-check the elicit -> infer -> verdict pipeline end to end.
